posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to have the possibility to have automations that will trigger when unarchiving items. For example, it would be nice to have the possibility to set a date to archive again, or to change a status that would re-trigger a new archive some time later.
“When item is unarchived, change status to … or set date to today”.
After a while, an unarchived item gets lost in the middle of all other items and is difficult to track. It is still a weird item, without connection. It must be managed manually and this can become a source of problems.
If anybody has a way to do this kind of automation, I’d be very happy to hear about it.
Anyway, I think it would be a nice addition to the automations.
Thanks for your comments

Franck
